user.title: Connect to Unsplash
user.description:
Enter your Unsplash **Access Key**.

Create one for free at {url} (Register → New Application). Use the Access Key, not the Secret Key.

error.rate_limit: Unsplash returned a rate-limit error. Wait an hour and try again, or upgrade your Unsplash application to production tier.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Unsplash API. Check your internet connection and try again.

abort.already_configured: An Unsplash integration is already configured with this access key.

add_collection.title: Add an Unsplash collection
add_collection.description:
Enter a public Unsplash Collection ID. The ID is the number at the end of the collection URL — e.g. `8975107` from `https://unsplash.com/collections/8975107`.

Leave the display name blank to use the collection's title from Unsplash.

**Refresh interval** and **orientation** are optional per-collection overrides. Leave them at “Inherit” to use the integration defaults ({default_interval}s, {default_orientation}). Use `-1` in the interval to inherit.

data.update_interval: Refresh interval in seconds (-1 = inherit default)

edit_collection.title: Edit collection
edit_collection.description:
Editing **{collection_name}** (`{collection_id}`).

Integer refresh interval in seconds (minimum 60), or `-1` to inherit the integration default ({default_interval}s).

Orientation “inherit” uses the integration default ({default_orientation}).

defaults.title: Default refresh settings
defaults.description:
These defaults apply to every collection unless that collection has its own override.

Minimum 60 seconds — be mindful of your Unsplash rate limit (50/hour on demo apps, 5000/hour on approved production apps).

error.invalid_auth: Unsplash rejected the access key. The key may have been revoked — reconfigure the integration.
error.collection_not_found: That collection couldn't be found. Make sure the ID is correct and the collection is public.

abort.no_collections: No collections are configured yet. Use “Add a collection” from the main options menu first.
abort.collection_not_found: That collection no longer exists in this integration.

refresh.name: Refresh image
refresh.description: Force one or more Unsplash image entities to fetch a fresh random photo now.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Specific entity (or list) to refresh. Omit to refresh every Unsplash image entity.
